name: Guangzhou Yuetai Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Yuetai Group Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate development, construction, operation, and management businesses in China and internationally. It primarily operates under the Yuetai brand name. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou Donghua Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangzhou Yuetai Group Co., Ltd. in May 2016. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
